title: Repair Run Review: UChicago and Caltech AI Policy Artifacts
summary: Local reviewer pass for repair run uapt-repair-20260506-3uni. The three original needs_changes claims were narrowed or reframed to match their bound evidence snippets, leaving 23 approved staged claim candidates across University of Chicago and California Institute of Technology. NUS is retained only as a rejected research-showcase source diagnostic in this run.
limitations: Staged artifacts only; do not publish canonical claims without the project publish workflow.
Caltech claims are scoped to admissions guidance and HSS division coursework guidance, not a university-wide AI policy.
NUS teaching-policy claims from the previous run are not included in this repair run; this run only rejects the NUS AI Institute page as research-showcase content.
No legal advice or academic integrity advice is provided.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
